prerequisites: A Goldcast organization with the API token feature enabled. API tokens are disabled by default, so you must contact Goldcast support to have the feature enabled for your organization.
Organization admin access in Goldcast. Only organization admins can create and delete tokens. If the teams feature is enabled, team admins cannot perform these actions.
The access_key config field, which holds the Goldcast API token used to authenticate requests.

authMethods.name: API token (access key)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Goldcast personal access token, supplied to the connector as the secret access_key. Tokens are created by an organization admin under Settings then Tokens, and function like ordinary OAuth access tokens. The token value is shown only once at creation, so copy and store it immediately.

setupSteps.title: Enable API tokens for your organization
setupSteps.body: API tokens are disabled in Goldcast by default. Contact Goldcast support to have the API token feature enabled for your organization before you can create one.

setupSteps.title: Create a token as an organization admin
setupSteps.body: Log into Goldcast Studio as an organization admin. Click the hamburger menu icon (top left), select Settings, choose the Tokens section, and click Create New Token. Name the token and select Generate Token. Only organization admins can create tokens.

setupSteps.title: Copy and store the token value
setupSteps.body: The token value is displayed only once at creation and cannot be retrieved later. Copy it immediately and store it securely. Deleting a token is irreversible and will break any integration using it.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the copied token as the access_key secret field. This is the only required config field for the connector.

sources.title: How To Create an API Token in Goldcast - Goldcast Knowledge Base
